raw_sql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS ticket_count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_ttr_hours,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS median_ttr_hours
FROM flag_10
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY month
template:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS ticket_count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_ttr_hours,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) AS median_ttr_hours
FROM flag_10
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
ORDER BY month

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT
  category,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS ticket_count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_ttr_hours
FROM flag_10
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY category, month

raw_sql:
SELECT
  assigned_to,
  COUNT(*) AS ticket_count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_ttr_hours,
  MIN(DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)) AS first_month,
  MAX(DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)) AS last_month,
  ROUND(CORR(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (opened_at - '2023-01-01'::timestamp))/86400,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600
  )::numeric, 4) AS ttr_vs_time_correlation
FROM flag_10
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY ttr_vs_time_correlation DESC
template:
SELECT
  assigned_to,
  COUNT(*) AS ticket_count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_ttr_hours,
  MIN(DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)) AS first_month,
  MAX(DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)) AS last_month,
  ROUND(CORR(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (opened_at - ?s::timestamp))/?n,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n
  )::numeric, ?n) AS ttr_vs_time_correlation
FROM flag_10
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
ORDER BY ttr_vs_time_correlation DESC

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT
  opened_at,
  closed_at,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600::numeric, 4) AS ttr_hours,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (opened_at - '2023-01-01'::timestamp))/3600::numeric, 4) AS hours_since_epoch_start,
  ROUND(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) /
    NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (opened_at - '2023-01-01'::timestamp)), 0)
  ::numeric, 6) AS ratio
FROM flag_10
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY opened_at
LIMIT 20
template:
SELECT
  opened_at,
  closed_at,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n::numeric, ?n) AS ttr_hours,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (opened_at - ?s::timestamp))/?n::numeric, ?n) AS hours_since_epoch_start,
  ROUND(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) /
    NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (opened_at - ?s::timestamp)), ?n)
  ::numeric, ?n) AS ratio
FROM flag_10
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY opened_at
LIMIT ?n

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT
  opened_at,
  closed_at,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600::numeric, 4) AS ttr_hours,
  EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) AS day_of_year,
  (EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) + 9) * 2.4 AS predicted_ttr_hours,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600::numeric, 4) - (EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) + 9) * 2.4 AS residual
FROM flag_10
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY opened_at
LIMIT 20
template:
SELECT
  opened_at,
  closed_at,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n::numeric, ?n) AS ttr_hours,
  EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) AS day_of_year,
  (EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) + ?n) * ?n AS predicted_ttr_hours,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n::numeric, ?n) - (EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) + ?n) * ?n AS residual
FROM flag_10
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY opened_at
LIMIT ?n

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_tickets,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 -
    (EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) + 9) * 2.4
  ) < 0.001 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS exact_formula_matches,
  MIN(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600::numeric, 4) -
    ((EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) + 9) * 2.4)::numeric) AS min_residual,
  MAX(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600::numeric, 4) -
    ((EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) + 9) * 2.4)::numeric) AS max_residual
FROM flag_10
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
template:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_tickets,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n -
    (EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) + ?n) * ?n
  ) < ?n THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS exact_formula_matches,
  MIN(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n::numeric, ?n) -
    ((EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) + ?n) * ?n)::numeric) AS min_residual,
  MAX(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n::numeric, ?n) -
    ((EXTRACT(DOY FROM opened_at) + ?n) * ?n)::numeric) AS max_residual
FROM flag_10
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))
